evals.expected_output: Should default to fun-facts.md, run all 10 checks, report findings per check with line numbers, end with summary table. Should find: duplicates, anachronism issues (Mishnah/Talmud used definitively for 1st-century texts), oversimplification flags (e.g. 其實是 on debated topics), and verbosity flags for long entries.
expectations: Output starts with '# 審查：fun-facts.md' or similar header identifying the file
All 10 checks appear as ### headers numbered 1 through 10
Check 6 (重複) identifies duplicate entries (e.g., L87/L140 chapter-verse overlap, L89/L90 amen overlap)
Check 3 (年代錯置) verifies dates against anachronism-timeline.md and flags imprecision (e.g., 1820s vs 1830s for Finney)
Check 4 (過度簡化) flags at least one entry using definitive language on debated topics (e.g., L75 interpolation as fact, L85 Aramaic-only)
Output ends with a summary table using | 檢查 | 結果 | format
Report uses 上主 (not 耶和華 or YHWH) when referring to the divine name
Report does NOT auto-fix or rewrite any entries — only reports issues
General sweep catches issues beyond reference file matches (e.g., causal direction errors, semantic range oversimplification)

evals.expected_output: Should review denomination-claims.md with all 10 checks. Some checks may have no findings and should be marked with ✅ 通過. Should still produce proper format with summary table.
expectations: Output starts with '# 審查：denomination-claims.md' or similar header
All 10 checks appear as ### headers
Checks with no findings show ✅ 通過 (not left blank)
Output ends with a summary table
Report does NOT auto-fix any content
Check 1 (事實錯誤) flags Colwell/Harner conflation as a methodological error

evals.prompt:
幫我檢查這段經文冷知識：
- 保羅在大馬士革路上從馬背上摔下來（使徒行傳 9:4）
- 約拿在鯨魚肚子裡三天三夜（約拿書 1:17）
- 十誡共有十二條（出埃及記 20 章）
- 耶穌在客西馬尼園禱告時流血汗（路加福音 22:44），這證明他只是普通人
evals.expected_output: Should review pasted text. Should catch: (1) factual error — Acts 9 never mentions a horse; (2) factual error — Jonah 1:17 says 大魚 not whale; (3) counting error — Ten Commandments are 10 not 12; (4) oversimplification — bloody sweat proving 'only human' is one-sided.
expectations: Output starts with '# 審查' header identifying this as user-provided content
Only checks 1-5 are run (checks 6-10 skipped for pasted text)
Check 1 (事實錯誤) flags the horse claim — Acts 9 does not mention a horse/馬
Check 1 or 2 flags the whale claim — Jonah 1:17 says 大魚 (dag gadol) not 鯨魚
Check 5 (數量計算) flags 十二條 as incorrect — should be ten
Check 4 (過度簡化) flags the 'only human' conclusion as oversimplified
Output ends with a summary table
Finds at least 3 distinct issues across the 4 entries

evals.expected_output: Should review translation-bias.md with all 10 checks. Translation comparison content should trigger check 3 (anachronism) awareness and check 4 (oversimplification) for definitive claims about translation superiority.
expectations: Output starts with '# 審查' header identifying translation-bias.md
All 10 checks appear as ### headers
Output ends with a summary table with | 檢查 | 結果 | format
Summary includes total issue count per check
Report does NOT auto-fix any content
Check 6 (重複) identifies duplicate content between main tables and Systemic Patterns table
